pluginDescription: Embeds external web pages or stream/video URLs in operator and automation panels.
embedNoticeDescription: Regular web pages load in an iframe. Stream URLs switch to a video player automatically. Autoplay is muted by default, and some sites may still refuse to be embedded because of their own iframe policy.
operatorCardUrlDescription: URL shown in the operator card panel for this operator.
automationPopoverUrlDescription: URL shown in the automation popover panel for this operator.
emptyDescription: Set a URL in this operator's plugin settings to render content here.
invalidDescription: Only http:// and https:// URLs are supported.
iframeHint: If the area stays blank or shows a refusal page, the target site is likely blocking iframe embedding with its own policy.
videoHint: Media URLs switch to a built-in player. Autoplay starts muted to maximize browser compatibility.
videoAutoplayFailed: Autoplay is ready but blocked. Click play to continue.
videoLoadFailed: Unable to load this video stream.
hlsLoadFailed: Unable to load the HLS stream.
